items.title: Water & Urban Gardening: Hacks for Hydration
items.summary: Explore how healthy soil and smart gardening practices can help conserve water while supporting thriving urban gardens.

items.title: Bollywood Monster Mashup 2026
items.summary: Celebrate the energy and spectacle of Bollywood with one of the biggest South Asian festivals of the summer. From star-studded performances to non-stop music and dance, this is where entertainment takes centre stage. Experience live concerts, electrifying dance performances, and a lineup of artists bringing Bollywood hits and beyond to life. Enjoy delicious food, explore vibrant vendors, and take in a festival atmosphere packed with colour, culture, and excitement.

items.title: ASD Band
items.summary: Join us for a special live performance featuring ASD Band , an award-winning group of four talented performers on the autism spectrum: vocalist Rawan Tuffaha , keyboardist Ron Adea , vocalist and lead guitarist Jackson Begley , and drummer Spenser Murray . Formed in 2019, ASD Band made an impressive debut performing alongside rock legend Roger Hodgson and a 43-piece orchestra on Give A Little Bit . Since then, the band has continued to captivate audiences with their musicianship, creativity, and inspiring journey.

items.title: A Glimpse into the Heart of a Singer-Songwriter
items.summary: Daphne Lane, and 10-year-old rising talent Kalia will take the stage for an evening of music and storytelling. Enjoy original songs performed by the artists who wrote them, hear the inspiration behind their work, and sing along to a selection of well-loved cover songs. Please note: This event is presented by a third-party organizer. Selecting “Prices & Tickets” will redirect you to an external website. The price listed above includes both the admission cost and the applicable third-party transaction fee.

items.title: Josh Warren's Groove Circus
items.summary: Join us for a performance by Josh Warren , a bassist, composer, and arranger originally from Victoria, BC. Currently completing his Bachelor of Music degree at Humber College, Josh has already performed on stages across Canada as both a bandleader and sought-after sideman. Known for his versatility, Josh performs across jazz, pop, rock, and soul, blending diverse influences into a distinctive sound that shines through in his original music. Please note: Events are weather permitting and subject to change.

items.title: Youth Summer Series Writing Workshop: Making Your Character Shine
items.summary: Join authors Sarena Nanua and Sasha Nanua for an engaging Author Talk and interactive workshop, “Making Your Character Shine.”

items.title: Summer Berry Salad
items.summary: Join us for an interactive, hands-on workshop that reconnects participants to the earth through the lens of Indigenous food sovereignty.

items.title: Mosaic Festival 2026
items.summary: The Mosaic Festival is the longest-running multidisciplinary South Asian arts festival in the Greater Toronto Area. Held annually at Mississauga Celebration Square, it is a vibrant, free, two-day celebration of South Asian heritage, featuring a high-energy mix of international headliners, local talent, and immersive cultural experiences.

items.title: Central Lions Farmers Market – Wednesdays
items.summary: Stop by the Central Lions Farmers Market this summer in Mississauga and experience a lively local shopping destination! m. m. m. m. m.
